case_title: DIPAK PATEL VS. LUCILLE TRAFICANTE et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DIPAK SERVED MAR-27-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS, CAMILLE
